title: Zapier > Monday broken w/ unresolvable 200 Error
excerpt: Started using Monday about 2 years ago and since we started with it one of the main functions was to track new incoming contact forms from our Wix page. Set up a really easy Zapier workflow to grab the form from Wix, cre…

posts.author: pppc (pppc)
posts.cookedHtml:
Started using Monday about 2 years ago and since we started with it one of the main functions was to track new incoming contact forms from our Wix page. Set up a really easy Zapier workflow to grab the form from Wix, create item in Monday and everything worked flawlessly.

For the last few weeks, it’s broken and for the life of me I can’t figure out why. I’ve tried the following, and every single time I get the same Error msg:

Failed to create an item in monday.com
The app returned 200 with no further details.

Tried the following to resolve this:

  • Refreshed API token - nope
  • Rebuilt the form we use on our website to Wix’s newer form format - nope
  • Deleted the old Zap, relogged into our Monday account, remapped everything - nope
  • Rather than trying to pull form data from Zapier’s direct integration with Wix, created a webhook to send from Wix, webhook to catch in Zapier and send to Monday - NOPE

This is not an issue with Wix, or Zapier, this is 100% an issue with Monday not reading and/or accepting the data that’s being sent.

Anybody seen this before and/or know how to resolve? I’m out of ideas.

posts.author: crusherbb (The Crusher)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you figure anything out here? Having the same issue

posts.author: RR21 (Raphael Razote)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having the same issue. For some reason my automations stop working because of this 200 error.

I have an API request zap step in several of my automations where I get the user details in Monday (via API) from HubSpot and when it tries to update the item’s people column using the user ID from Monday, this error pops up.

I’m not sure what’s changed, but this hasn’t happened until recently.
